name: Seated Leg Raises
description: Straighten one leg at a time while sitting to engage the quadriceps.

name: Seated Knee-to-Chest
description: Pull one knee toward your chest while sitting to activate the abdominal muscles.

name: Seated Reverse Crunches
description: Lift both knees together toward your chest while holding the chair for stability.

name: Seated Spine Twists
description: Rotate your torso slowly from side to side while seated to stretch the back.

name: Seated Glute Squeezes
description: Contract and hold your gluteal muscles while sitting to activate the posterior chain.

name: Seated Flutter Kicks
description: Extend legs and move them up and down in a small, rapid motion while seated.

name: Seated Figure-4 Stretch
description: Cross one ankle over the opposite knee and lean forward to stretch the hips.

name: Seated Calf Raises
description: Lift your heels off the ground while sitting to activate the calf muscles.

name: Seated Shoulder Shrugs
description: Lift your shoulders toward your ears and release to relieve tension in the traps.

name: Seated Cat-Cow
description: Arch and round your back while seated to improve spinal mobility.

name: Seated Bicep Curls
description: Mimic a curling motion with your arms to engage the biceps while sitting.

name: Magic Carpet Ride
description: Lift your body off the chair using your arms and core for an isometric hold.

name: Desk Push-ups
description: Perform a push-up leaning against the edge of a sturdy desk.

name: Desk Plank
description: Hold a plank position with your forearms resting on the desk surface.

name: Desk Tricep Dips
description: Use the edge of the desk to lower and raise your body using your triceps.

name: Desk Chest Stretch
description: Place hands on the desk and step back, dropping your head between arms to stretch the chest.

name: Desk Forearm Stretch
description: Pull fingers back against the desk or press palms together to stretch the wrists.

name: Desk Wrist Rolls
description: Rotate your wrists in circular motions while resting your forearms on the desk.

name: Desk Mountain Climbers
description: Bring knees toward the desk in a running motion while leaning on the desk.

name: Desk Oblique Twists
description: Lean on the desk and rotate your hips from side to side to engage the side abs.

name: Desk Heel Raises
description: Stand behind your desk and lift your heels while using the desk for balance.

name: Desk Standing Fold
description: Lean forward from the hips with hands on the desk to stretch the hamstrings.

name: Desk Finger Stretches
description: Spread fingers wide and press them against the desk surface to relieve hand tension.

name: Desk Isometric Press
description: Press your palms against the desk with maximum force for a chest hold.

name: Wall Sit
description: Lean your back against a wall and lower into a squat position, holding it isometrically.

name: Wall Push-ups
description: Stand facing a wall and perform push-ups by pressing away from it.

name: Wall Chest Opener
description: Place one arm against a wall and rotate your body away to stretch the pectoral muscles.

name: Wall Slides
description: Press your back and arms against a wall and slide your arms up and down.

name: Wall Calf Stretch
description: Place hands on a wall and step one foot back, pressing the heel down to stretch the calf.

name: Wall Tricep Stretch
description: Place an elbow against the wall and lean in to stretch the back of the arm.

name: Wall Angels
description: Mimic snow angels with your back and arms flat against a wall to improve shoulder mobility.

name: Wall Hip Flexor Stretch
description: Stand with one foot against a wall and lunge forward to stretch the hip area.

name: Wall Standing Marches
description: Stand facing a wall for balance and lift your knees high in a marching motion.

name: Wall Glute Kickbacks
description: Face a wall and kick one leg back while keeping it straight to activate the glutes.

name: Wall Side Plank
description: Lean sideways against a wall with one forearm for an isometric core hold.

name: Wall Standing Fold
description: Place hands on a wall and walk feet back until body forms an L-shape to stretch the back.

name: Standing Marches
description: Lift knees high while standing in place to engage the core and lower body.

name: Shadow Boxing
description: Throw controlled punches in the air to improve arm mobility and heart rate.

name: Jumping Jacks
description: Perform standard jumping jacks to engage the full body and increase intensity.

name: Neck Rotations
description: Slowly roll your head in a circular motion to improve neck mobility.

name: Shoulder Rolls
description: Rotate your shoulders forward and backward to release tension and improve posture.

name: Forward Fold
description: Bend forward at the waist while standing to stretch the entire posterior chain.

name: Standing Quad Stretch
description: Pull one heel toward your glutes while standing to stretch the front of the thigh.

name: Standing Calf Raises
description: Lift your heels off the ground while standing to strengthen the lower legs.

name: High Knees
description: Run in place while bringing your knees up toward your chest for a high-intensity burn.

name: Side Lunges
description: Step out to the side and bend one knee while keeping the other straight to engage glutes.

name: Arm Circles
description: Extend arms to the sides and make small or large circular motions.

name: Standing Oblique Crunch
description: Bring your elbow toward the same-side knee while standing to engage the side abs.

name: Standing Cat-Cow
description: Arch and round your spine while standing with hands on knees for spinal mobility.

name: Standing Glute Hold
description: Contract and hold your glutes while standing for an isometric activation.
